ddt:Target.Name: Manual_Air_conditionning_X62_V1
ddt:Target.Description:
Chauffage / Climatisation Manuelle X62
Auteur : Nicolas DUPUIS
mail : nicolas.dupuis@renault.com
4.5 : ajout data & requetes pour MAP eclairage et position recy partiel - voir ecrans description des DTC status 08 09 et 0D (suite rem. RT)
4.6 ; correction requete Write_pospart_recy
4.7 : ajout requete 2121 +ecran ManufacturerIdentificationCode passe en hexa ajout n° SW pour auto ident
4.8 : ajout device A_ref_renault pour permettre lecture de la ref piece RENAULT MPR via un read DTC
4.9 : ajout ecran MAP distribution + nouvelle version SW 4.19 pr auto ident màj reponse ECURESET : 5100
4.9 : ajout bit inhibition diag Open Circuit LARC cmd pour SW4.19 et SW4.20 adress est 0x0006F0, Ecrir AA pour l'abilitation et 55 pour la dis-abilitation ajout ECRAN "REFERENCE"
5.1: officialisation 24 /2/9 : suppression des ecrans deidies MAP
5.2 : ValueToBeWrittenManu : mise en hexa ald numeric requete "lire_mix_pos" supprimée ajout SW4.25 pour auto detection ajout ecran "calibrations"
5.3 : ajout pour validations banc - dans ecran IO control, requete manuelle pour connaitre le status ajout SW4.26 pour auto detection

Item.Text: Reset learning values (calibration for the stepper actuators and self-learnig for DC-motor)
APV Session (Assembly Line testing an After-Sales)

Data.Name: GroupOfDiagInfo
Data.Comment: used to identify the functional groups of codes to be selected

Item.Text: FF01 - FF0F : Free allocation for the function manager. Values NOTallowed
Control stopped by controlOption parameter set to "Stop Control" (11)
VENT / COLD / FRESH AIR / LED OFF

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Start_Diag_Communication
Request.Comment: Sequence to initiate just after fast init

Request.Name: Stop_Diag_Communication
Request.Comment: Sequence to stop communication (Fast init necessary after completion of this command)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: Use this request if you want failure page erase failures.

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.AfterSale
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 for screen-Spec A - switch to after sale session

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Label.Text: lower part of electronic board SIGNE 5 digits ref.
lower part of SW SIGNE 5 digits ref.
Warning : logistic REF can only be read with this screen - "ident screen" (i) of DDT only display ref for software and ref for hardware (=electronics)
